title: 微软市值蒸发 5300 亿美元 股价恐创 2008 年以来最差月度表现

title: 0xNyk/council-of-high-intelligence
content: A Shell command-line tool summons 18 AI personas modeled after historical figures like Aristotle, Feynman, Kahneman, and Torvalds for structured, multi-round deliberation. title: logto-io/logto
content: Logto is an open-source authentication and authorization infrastructure for SaaS and AI applications. Built on OIDC and OAuth 2.1, it supports multi-tenancy, single sign-on, and role-based access control. Written in TypeScript, the project has over 12,000 stars and 800 forks on GitHub.

title: Unclecheng-li/VulnClaw
content: VulnClaw is a Python-based security tool that uses an AI agent with MCP toolchains and penetration testing skill orchestration. It automates the full vulnerability assessment workflow from information gathering through vulnerability discovery, exploitation, and report generation via natural language input.

title: Beyond P(doom): Marc Andreessen - Betting on America
content: Marc Andreessen discusses AI's economic impact with CSIS, arguing its largest effects are still coming. He examines AI's potential to expand expertise access and transform sectors like healthcare, education, law, and software. He identifies institutional barriers—regulation, policy, and infrastructure—as bigger obstacles than technology itself. The conversation addresses the U.S.-China AI competition, export controls, data centers, energy, reindustrialization, defense technology, and government's innovation role, concluding that America can still lead the next economic growth wave.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Marc Andreessen, Navin Girishankar)

normalizedTitle: beyond p doom marc andreessen - betting on america

title: DeepSeek V4 正式版计划于 7 月中旬正式上线 --定价调整了。。
content: DeepSeek V4 will launch officially in mid-July with feature and performance improvements. API pricing will adopt peak-valley rates upon release. For deepseek-v4-pro, peak-hour prices double: cached input costs 0.05 yuan per million tokens, uncached input 6 yuan, and output 12 yuan. For deepseek-v4-flash, cached input costs 0.04 yuan, uncached input 2 yuan, and output 4 yuan. Peak hours are 9:00–12:00 and 14:00–18:00 Beijing time.

title: 老黄：Prompt已死，整个AI圈都在疯狂追Loop
content: Silicon Valley is shifting from prompt engineering to "Loop Engineering," where AI systems autonomously run discovery-execution-validation-persistence-schedule cycles 24/7. Nvidia's Jensen Huang and others declare prompts obsolete; Anthropic reports 80%+ of engineers already use self-improving loops. The approach requires human architects to design goals, verification (independent evaluator agents), and memory persistence, then step back. Risks include validation debt, human cognitive surrender, and runaway token costs. The paradigm treats human judgment as the scarce resource while making code generation nearly free.
eventKey: prompt已死-整个ai圈都在疯狂追loop
normalizedTitle: 老黄 prompt已死 整个ai圈都在疯狂追loop

title: 存储算力日益短缺，谷歌开始探索让旧手机组队做AI服务器了
content: Google and UC San Diego are exploring a distributed computing platform using 2,000 retired Pixel Fold phones as servers. The phones are stripped to motherboards, removing batteries, cases, and cameras to reduce fire risks, then run Linux instead of Android. Connected via wired networking PCB boards, clusters of 25-50 phones provide combined compute power with low energy consumption. While unsuitable for large AI model training, this approach offers cost-effective, low-latency edge computing for localized AI inference and workloads, addressing rising chip shortages and energy demands despite concerns about hardware reliability and maintenance complexity.
eventKey: 存储算力日益短缺-谷歌开始探索让旧手机组队做ai服务器了

title: 36氪首发 | 「CAYE咖爷科技」完成近4亿元B轮融资，系商用全自动咖啡机赛道单笔最大规模融资
content: CAYE, a Chinese commercial automatic coffee machine maker, raised nearly 400 million yuan in Series B funding led by Meituan Longzhu, marking the largest single financing in its sector. Founded in December 2022, the company builds machines with food-grade metal components instead of plastic to address food safety risks. Its self-developed systems control powder weight within ±0.2g and reduce operational costs. CAYE fully develops core components in-house, leveraging supply chains from automotive and medical industries. Products are sold in over 80 countries, with domestic annual sales surpassing imported competitors' decade-long totals. The funding will support R&D, production expansion, and global market growth.
eventKey: 36氪首发-「caye咖爷科技」完成近4亿元b轮融资-系商用全自动咖啡机赛道单笔最大规模融资

title: 35岁职场人，又好找工作了？
content: AI is reshaping hiring demand: junior roles requiring under one year of experience fell roughly 20%, while AI engineer positions for new graduates surged 39.2%. Employers now prioritize decision-making and risk judgment over execution, benefiting experienced workers who combine domain knowledge with AI proficiency. Companies are shrinking teams while deploying AI agents, cutting headcount by up to 70% in some cases. Success depends on actively adopting AI tools, maintaining adaptability, and avoiding path dependency—age itself is not determinative, but the willingness to integrate AI with expertise is.
eventKey: 35岁职场人-又好找工作了
normalizedTitle: 35岁职场人 又好找工作了

title: iPhone 18搞出“9GB”奇葩内存规格，苹果无愧“刀法大师”称号？
content: Apple is raising prices for the iPhone 18 series, with standard models up $50 and Pro models up to $200, citing rising DRAM and NAND costs driven by AI demand. However, the baseline iPhone 18 will feature an unusual 9GB RAM—just 1GB more than its predecessor—carefully positioned below the Pro models' 12GB. The article questions whether consumers should pay hardware premiums for AI features that increasingly rely on cloud processing rather than on-device capability.
eventKey: iphone-18搞出“9gb”奇葩内存规格-苹果无愧“刀法大师”称号

title: 一场没有退路的豪赌：解码阿里腾讯字节的AI“总攻”路线图
content: China's three largest internet companies—Alibaba, Tencent, and ByteDance—are making unprecedented AI investments to avoid being disrupted by generative AI. Alibaba's CEO Wu Yongming leads the most comprehensive strategy with a four-layer architecture covering chips, cloud infrastructure, open-source models (Qwen), and applications. ByteDance excels in consumer products like Doubao (140 million daily users) and video generation (Seedance) but lags in infrastructure. Tencent takes a pragmatic, ecosystem-integrated approach leveraging WeChat. All three aim to become AI super-entrances, shifting competition from user traffic to task completion rates, though profitability remains distant due to high inference costs.
eventKey: 一场没有退路的豪赌-解码阿里腾讯字节的ai“总攻”路线图

title: 电池新规来了，7月1日施行
content: China's new EV battery safety standard (GB38031-2025) takes effect July 1, 2026, with a one-year transition period. Key upgrades include extending thermal runaway safety time from 5 minutes to 2 hours without fire or explosion, requiring active thermal blocking capability, mandating physical emergency power cutoff switches, and adding bottom impact and fast-charging cycle tests. Smoke must not harm occupants. Some manufacturers like Xiaomi, XPeng, and BYD have already met standards. Compliance costs are modest (~$100-150 per battery pack), though low-cost models face greater pressure. Full market compliance is expected by July 2027.
eventKey: 电池新规来了-7月1日施行
normalizedTitle: 电池新规来了 7月1日施行
